title: BoilerSupervisorModesExecution v1
description: Generic package mode transition execution surface for the boiler-like Wave 14 reference domain.

package_definition.title: BoilerSupervisorModesExecution v1
boundary_notes: Wave 14 opens only bounded package mode / phase execution baseline.
Boiler-like content remains reference-only and does not introduce burner sequence runtime.

members.title: Boiler Mode Core
members.boundary_note: Package transition execution stays bounded and package-neutral over this child lane.

members.title: Flow Guard
members.boundary_note: Guard diagnostics stay synthetic and do not become safety runtime.

active_transition.summary: Synthetic package phase start is running over the bounded run lane.

transition_actions.title: Request Service Mode
transition_actions.summary: Synthetic mode change baseline completed without opening package-specific execution.

transition_actions.title: Start Run Phase
transition_actions.summary: Phase start remains a bounded generic request over the active run lane.

transition_actions.title: Abort Shutdown Phase
transition_actions.summary: Abort is surfaced as blocked by guard diagnostics rather than hidden sequence behavior.

mode_summary_entries.title: Auto Summary
mode_summary_entries.summary: Auto is the current bounded execution mode.

mode_summary_entries.title: Service Summary
mode_summary_entries.summary: Service is available only on explicit bounded request.

phase_summary_entries.title: Precheck Summary
phase_summary_entries.summary: Precheck is active while bounded run request is being evaluated.

phase_summary_entries.title: Run Summary
phase_summary_entries.summary: Run lane is the target of the current synthetic phase start.

mode_groups.title: Availability Modes
mode_groups.summary: Off and auto remain the bounded availability lane.

phase_groups.title: Active Phases
phase_groups.summary: Run and shutdown remain the bounded active phase lanes.
